Who We Are

A studio built on craft and conviction

Flymo is a creative web studio building fast, modern websites for businesses that want to stand out online. We don't do templates — every project is built from the ground up with intention, precision, and a serious eye for design.

Based in Nigeria. Built for the world.

Why Choose Us

The Flymo difference

i.

Fast Delivery

Most projects wrapped in 3–10 days. No dragging timelines, no chasing updates.

ii.

Honest Pricing

World-class design at prices that make sense for African businesses. No hidden fees.

iii.

Modern Design

Every site looks current, intentional, and like it was built by people who care — because it was.

iv.

Mobile Responsive

Pixel-perfect on every screen. Your audience is on mobile — we build with that in mind, always.

honest pricing
